ham.subject: Project Submission Reminder – Final Deadline May 15
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a friendly reminder that the semester project submissions are due on Friday, May 15th. Please ensure your reports and presentations are uploaded to the course LMS by 5:00 PM.

If you encounter any issues or need an extension, contact me by Thursday noon.

Looking forward to your submissions.

Best regards,
Dr. Jane Smith
Academic Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Income Tax Refund is Ready – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Mr./Ms. [Surname],

We are pleased to inform you that your tax refund of $5,000 is ready for release. To claim your refund, please confirm your bank account details by clicking the secure link below.

<URL>

Failure to complete verification within 7 days may result in forfeiture.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
